markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Diagnose a post-refresh traffic drop and align on future strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Traffic Drop Diagnosis:** A post-refresh traffic drop is linked to a Googlebot crawl issue (fewer requests, slower response times) and compounded by a sitemap update for 600+ articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [**Root Cause Hypothesis:** The issue may stem from Vercel build processes that trigger full sitemap updates on every change, causing excessive recrawl requests.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [**Strategic Shift:** The focus will shift from top-of-funnel organic traffic to high-quality, LLM-referred leads, using Check That and social listening to inform strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [**Contract Discussion:** An annual contract requires a clear value-add (e.g., discount, new services) to secure CFO approval over the current flexible 3-month term.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)

## Topics

### Traffic Drop Diagnosis

  - [A significant traffic drop followed the recent website refresh, accelerating in the last 1.5 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [**Diagnosis:** Googlebot crawl data shows a sharp decline in crawl requests and a significant increase in response times.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
      - [This pattern is unusual and suggests a technical issue, not a content or 404 problem.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [**Compounding Factor:** A sitemap update for 600+ articles occurred around the same time, likely sending a large, confusing signal to Google.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [**Webstacks' Initial Fixes:**](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
      - [Removed non-Webstacks scripts from the Sanity template \~1.5 weeks ago.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
      - [Noted a drop in bot traffic (via PostHog) that may be affecting impression data.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
      - [**Significance:** These fixes haven't resolved the core crawl issue, as response times continue to worsen.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)

### Root Cause Hypothesis

  - [**Hypothesis:** The issue is a Vercel build process that triggers a full sitemap update on every page change.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
      - [**Impact:** This would force Google to recrawl the entire site repeatedly, overwhelming the server and causing the observed crawl performance degradation.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [**Additional Finding:** An AI tool (Claude) was blocked by Cloudflare with a 403 error.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
      - [**Significance:** This suggests a potential issue with bot access that may also be affecting Googlebot.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)

### Content & Sanity Updates

  - [**FAQ/TLDR Modules:**](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
      - [**Request:** Add dedicated Sanity modules for FAQs and TLDRs to blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
      - [**Status:** The FAQ module exists for site pages but not blog posts. The TLDR can use the existing `excerpt` field.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
      - [**Action:** Jesse will investigate adding the FAQ module to the blog schema.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)

### Strategic Roadmap & AEO

  - [**Goal:** Shift strategy from top-of-funnel organic traffic to high-quality, LLM-referred leads.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [**Methodology:** Use Check That (GrowthX's new AI visibility tool) and social listening to inform a data-driven content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [**Key Insight:** YouTube is currently the strongest signal for driving AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)
      - [**Action:** Explore a strategy for YouTube and Reddit, where Webstacks has a limited presence.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)
  - [**Process:** Establish a recurring cadence for sharing business context (e.g., Gong calls, customer patterns) to inform content themes.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=2025.0)

### Contract Discussion

  - [**GrowthX's Goal:** Transition to an annual contract.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [**Webstacks' Requirement:** CFO approval requires a clear value-add to justify moving from the current flexible 3-month term.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
      - [**Examples:** A discount or new services.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jesse:**](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
      - [Investigate Vercel build processes for sitemap update behavior.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
      - [Check Sanity schema to add an FAQ module for blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
      - [Send a batch of recent Gong call recordings to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)
  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
      - [Send the Check That demo to Jesse by EOD Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
      - [Schedule a recurring meeting to sync on business context for content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=2089.0)
  - [**Kyle:**](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)
      - [Consult with GrowthX's engineering/SEO team on the crawl data to help focus Webstacks' investigation.](https://fathom.video/share/Vs2uzs9Kz8cfy1X-KoDZ4-NGaR8wENFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)
